title: OP Lucky Veins
description: Turn every ore vein into a treasure hunt! This pack gives you a chance to find hidden loot chests every time you break an ore.
body:
💎 Ore Loot Overhaul: From Stones to Riches
Why explore the whole world when the treasures can come to you? This data pack completely revamps mining. Every time you break an ore, you get the loot of legendary structures, dungeons, and rare vaults!

🛠️ Low-Tier Ores (The Essentials)
Coal Ore: Drops loot from Starter Chests and various Village Houses (Plains, Desert, Savanna, Taiga, and Snowy villages). Includes every possible chest from butcher shops to weapon smiths!

Copper Ore: Drops items from Ominous Trials, Trial Vaults, Minecart Chests, and Trial Chamber barrels. Perfect for getting those early-game trial keys and components!

⚔️ Mid-Tier Ores (The Adventure)
Iron Ore: Drops loot from Shipwrecks (map & treasure chests), Desert Pyramids, and Jungle Temples (including the arrow dispensers and both hidden chests!).

Gold Ore: Has a 75% chance to drop the rich loot found in Ruined Portals.

Redstone Ore: Grants you the high-end treasures found deep within the Woodland Mansion.

👑 High-Tier Ores (The God-Tier)
Diamond Ore: The ultimate jackpot. Drops everything from Stronghold Libraries (Enchanted Books!) and the terrifying Ancient Cities (Swift Sneak, Echo Shards, and more).

Emerald Ore: Every emerald is a map to victory, dropping Buried Treasure loot.

🔥 Nether & End Materials
Nether Quartz: A gambler's dream. 50% chance for a Heavy Core and 50% chance for 16 Breeze Rods.

Nether Gold Ore: Direct wealth – drops 16 Gold Blocks instantly.

Ancient Debris: Rare and powerful – drops the elite loot from End Cities

All deepslate variants drop the same thing exept the emerald one. It dorps an enchanted book.

⚡There are 6 aditional things which are not ores but still drop op stuff.

Birch door: Emerald ore ( for easier start)
Birch slab: Ender pearL
Coarse dirt: Trident
Glass pane: OP Bow
TNT: 64 firework rockets 
Stripped spruce log: Elytra
